# openwrt-docs4ai - Complete Flat Catalog
> **Total Context:** ~426092 tokens

- [L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-dockerman-ucode-controller-docker-uc.md](./L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-dockerman-ucode-controller-docker-uc.md) (3114 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-dockerman-ucode-docker-socket-uc.md](./L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-dockerman-ucode-docker-socket-uc.md) (724 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-form-js.md](./L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-form-js.md) (476 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-htmlview-js.md](./L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-htmlview-js.md) (318 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-rpc-js.md](./L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-rpc-js.md) (1185 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-rpc-jsonmap-tablesection-js.md](./L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-rpc-jsonmap-tablesection-js.md) (923 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-rpc-jsonmap-typedsection-js.md](./L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-htdocs-luci-static-resources-view-example-rpc-jsonmap-typedsection-js.md) (924 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-root-usr-share-rpcd-ucode-example-uc.md](./L2-semantic/luci-examples/example_app-luci-app-example-root-usr-share-rpcd-ucode-example-uc.md) (292 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-cbi.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-cbi.md) (3075 tokens) - Implements the CBI declarative form framework for LuCI. Defines Map, Section, TypedSection, TableSection, and over 30 widget classes including Value, Flag, ListValue, MultiValue, DynamicList, and TextValue; CBI maps UCI package sections directly to HTML forms and calls uci.save() on submit, enabling config UIs with minimal JavaScript.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-firewall.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-firewall.md) (262 tokens) - Implements the LuCI firewall abstraction over the nftables/iptables UCI config. Provides Firewall, Zone, Rule, Redirect, and Forwarding classes; Firewall.getZones() returns zone objects with getNetworks(), getSrcRules(), getDestRules(); Rule and Redirect mirror UCI firewall sections and expose getOptions(), setOption(), and remove() for in-memory editing before save.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-form.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-form.md) (143 tokens) - Provides the first-class LuCI form rendering framework used by modern views. Defines Map, JSONMap, Section, NamedSection, TableSection, and GridSection containers plus widget types (Flag, Value, ListValue, DynamicList, MultiValue, SectionValue, HiddenValue); supports async option loading via load() and custom validation callbacks on each widget.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-fs.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-fs.md) (140 tokens) - Provides the LuCI client-side filesystem API that proxies calls to the rpcd file plugin over HTTP. Implements stat(), list(), read(), write(), exec(), remove(), and lines(); all functions return Promises and pass arguments as JSON to the /ubus endpoint, so the calling LuCI view does not need to manage XHR directly.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-luci.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-luci.md) (14614 tokens) - Defines the core LuCI JavaScript framework and application runtime. Implements the LuCI class with load(), resolveDefault(), bind(), require(), raise(), and the env runtime property for accessing router info; also exposes the Class.extend() inheritance model used by all other LuCI modules and manages async module loading via XHR.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-protocol-static.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-protocol-static.md) (217 tokens) - Implements the LuCI protocol handler for static IP interfaces. Extends the base network Protocol class with getIPAddr(), getNetmask(), getGateway(), and getDNS() accessors that read directly from the UCI interface section; used by the LuCI Network model when rendering or editing a static-type interface in the Interfaces page.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-tools-prng.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-tools-prng.md) (982 tokens) - Provides a lightweight pseudo-random number generator utility for the LuCI frontend. Implements prng.generate(n) to produce n-byte hex strings and prng.uuid() for v4-compatible UUID generation; uses the Web Crypto API when available and falls back to Math.random(), making it suitable for generating unique DOM IDs and one-time tokens in LuCI views.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-tools-widgets.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-tools-widgets.md) (126 tokens) - Provides reusable LuCI view-level widget helpers shared across multiple LuCI packages. Implements bandwidth graph components, interface status badges, SSID/signal display helpers, and shared CSS-class-to-color mappings; widgets are instantiated in render() methods and updated live via polling or event callbacks rather than full page reloads.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-uci.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-uci.md) (95 tokens) - Provides the LuCI JavaScript UCI binding that defers all reads and writes to batched rpcd calls. Implements load(), get(), set(), unset(), save(), apply(), revert(), sections(), add(), remove(), and foreach(); changes are staged in memory and only flushed to the router on save()/apply(), making it safe to call get() before load() resolves.
- [L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-ui.md](./L2-semantic/luci/js_source-api-ui.md) (69 tokens) - Provides the LuCI client-side UI widget and notification layer. Implements ui.addNotification(), ui.showModal(), ui.hideModal(), ui.addTab(), ui.showTabs(); defines typed input widgets (Textfield, Combobox, Dropdown, DynamicList, FileUpload, Select, Checkbox) and live-state helpers (NetworkMenu, PacketMonitor); also manages the XHR indicator lifecycle.
- [L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-boot.md](./L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-boot.md) (3710 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-firmware.md](./L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-firmware.md) (1435 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-kernel.md](./L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-kernel.md) (2744 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-libs.md](./L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-libs.md) (5273 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-system.md](./L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-system.md) (2031 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-utils.md](./L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-category-utils.md) (5864 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-include-mk.md](./L2-semantic/openwrt-core/makefile_meta-include-mk.md) (2083 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/openwrt-hotplug/hotplug_event-netifd-hotplug-events.md](./L2-semantic/openwrt-hotplug/hotplug_event-netifd-hotplug-events.md) (1412 tokens) - Documents the standard hotplug event environment variables injected by OpenWrt's netifd and network subsystems into scripts in /etc/hotplug.d/. Covers iface subsystem events (ifup, ifdown, ifupdate) with $INTERFACE, $DEVICE, and $ACTION variables; net subsystem events for physical interface changes; and hotplug script patterns using uci_toggle_state for persistent state tracking.
- [L2-semantic/procd/header_api-procd-api.md](./L2-semantic/procd/header_api-procd-api.md) (352 tokens) - Defines the procd init script Bash API for service registration and supervised process lifecycle control. Exposes procd_open_service(), procd_close_service(), procd_open_instance(), procd_close_instance(), and procd_set_param() for declaring supervised processes with respawn rules, environment variables, limits, file triggers, and bound network devices. Also provides procd_add_reload_trigger() for UCI-based reload events.
- [L2-semantic/uci/uci_schema-schema-network-qos.md](./L2-semantic/uci/uci_schema-schema-network-qos.md) (420 tokens) - Defines the default UCI configuration schema for the OpenWrt qos-scripts traffic-shaping system. Specifies interface sections with classgroup, enabled, upload (kbit/s), and download (kbit/s) options, and classify sections mapping port ranges, protocols, and address patterns to priority classes (Priority, Express, Normal, Bulk) used by the HFS+ queue discipline.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-debug.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-debug.md) (3903 tokens) - Provides runtime introspection and tracing utilities for ucode scripts. Implements traceback() to capture the current call stack, getinfo() to inspect function and closure metadata, and memdump() for object inspection at runtime. Used primarily for structured error reporting and development-time debugging in production handlers.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-digest.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-digest.md) (1601 tokens) - Provides cryptographic hash and HMAC computation for ucode. Implements new() returning a digest context with update() and final() methods, supporting MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512, and HMAC variants. Enables incremental hashing of large data streams and one-shot hash computation for data integrity checking and API authentication tokens.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-fs.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-fs.md) (10288 tokens) - Provides POSIX-style filesystem access for ucode scripts. Implements readfile(), writefile(), popen(), opendir(), stat(), rename(), unlink(), chmod(), realpath(), and readlink() for complete file and directory management. Supports atomic writes via temporary file patterns and direct subprocess output capture through popen() stream objects.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-io.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-io.md) (4058 tokens) - Provides buffered I/O stream primitives for ucode. Implements open() and fdopen() returning stream objects with read(), write(), readline(), flush(), seek(), tell(), and close() methods. Exposes io.stdin, io.stdout, and io.stderr as pre-opened streams, and pipe() for creating connected stream pairs for subprocess communication.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-log.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-log.md) (5098 tokens) - Provides syslog integration for ucode scripts via the POSIX syslog API. Exposes openlog(), syslog(), and closelog() with facility constants (LOG_DAEMON, LOG_USER, LOG_LOCAL0–LOG_LOCAL7) and priority constants (LOG_DEBUG, LOG_INFO, LOG_NOTICE, LOG_WARNING, LOG_ERR, LOG_CRIT). Enables structured kernel-level log emission from ucode services.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-math.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-math.md) (2848 tokens) - Provides standard mathematical functions for ucode scripts, mirroring the JavaScript Math object surface. Implements abs(), atan2(), ceil(), cos(), exp(), floor(), log(), max(), min(), pow(), round(), sin(), sqrt(), and tan() along with the constants math.PI and math.E for floating-point arithmetic.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-nl80211.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-nl80211.md) (3950 tokens) - Provides netlink 802.11 wireless configuration API bindings for ucode. Implements request() to send and receive nl80211 commands including NL80211_CMD_GET_INTERFACE, NL80211_CMD_GET_STATION, NL80211_CMD_TRIGGER_SCAN, and regulatory domain queries. Returns structured attribute dictionaries parsed from kernel nl80211 netlink messages.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-resolv.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-resolv.md) (2516 tokens) - Provides DNS name resolution for ucode scripts using the system resolver. Implements query() for raw DNS record lookups (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, etc.) and getaddrinfo() for hostname-to-address resolution returning both IPv4 and IPv6 results in a structured array.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-rtnl.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-rtnl.md) (7614 tokens) - Provides rtnetlink interface bindings for ucode to enumerate and monitor kernel network state. Implements request() to send RTM_GETLINK, RTM_GETROUTE, RTM_GETNEIGH, and RTM_GETADDR queries and receive structured attribute dictionaries from the kernel. Enables subscription to netlink multicast groups for real-time interface and route change notifications.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-socket.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-socket.md) (13517 tokens) - Provides low-level socket programming for ucode via POSIX socket API bindings. Implements create() for AF_INET, AF_INET6, and AF_UNIX socket creation, plus connect(), bind(), listen(), accept(), send(), recv(), recvfrom(), sendto(), close(), setsockopt(), and getsockopt() for full network and IPC socket lifecycle management.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-struct.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-struct.md) (7325 tokens) - Provides binary data packing and unpacking for ucode using a Python struct-style format string syntax. Implements pack() to encode values into a binary string and unpack() to decode a binary buffer into an array of typed values. Supports format codes for unsigned/signed integers of all widths (B, H, I, Q), floats, and byte strings.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-uci.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-uci.md) (7849 tokens) - Provides direct ucode bindings for OpenWrt libuci to read and write UCI configuration. Exposes cursor() to create a UCI cursor with methods get(), set(), unset(), commit(), revert(), sections(), foreach(), delete(), and add() for complete UCI config management from ucode scripts. Supports transactional reads and staged writes with explicit commit.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-uloop.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-uloop.md) (7457 tokens) - Provides ucode bindings for the OpenWrt libubox uloop event loop. Implements asynchronous programming primitives including timer(), interval(), handle(), process(), signal(), task(), and run() for single-threaded event-driven applications. Supports file descriptor watching, child process lifecycle management, and UNIX signal handling within ucode scripts.
- [L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-zlib.md](./L2-semantic/ucode/c_source-api-module-zlib.md) (1913 tokens) - Provides zlib compression and decompression bindings for ucode. Implements compress() and uncompress() for raw deflate/inflate over in-memory byte strings, and deflate()/inflate() for streaming compression contexts. Supports gzip-format data via gzip_compress() and gzip_uncompress() for HTTP transfer-encoding and configuration snapshot handling.
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-20-xx-major-changes.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-20-xx-major-changes.md) (2106 tokens) - No description

- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-packages.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-packages.md) (11047 tokens) - Step-by-step guide for creating a new OpenWrt package from scratch. Covers directory layout under package/mypackage/, the minimal Makefile skeleton (include $(TOPDIR)/rules.mk, Package/define, Build/Compile, Package/install), adding dependencies via DEPENDS:=, using PKG_INSTALL=1 vs. custom Build/Compile, creating conffiles, installing init scripts, and submitting packages to the upstream feed.
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-procd-init-script-example.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-procd-init-script-example.md) (2384 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-procd-init-scripts.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-procd-init-scripts.md) (5333 tokens) - Practical guide for writing procd-based /etc/init.d/ service scripts. Walks through USE_PROCD=1, procd_open_instance, procd_set_param command/respawn/stdout/stderr, procd_close_instance, and the service_triggers() callback for uci-change-triggered reloads; includes worked examples for a simple daemon, a daemon with multiple instances, and a service that reloads on UCI changes to a specific package.

- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-ubus.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-guide-developer-ubus.md) (405 tokens) - Practical guide for using ubus from shell scripts, C code, and Lua/ucode. Covers the ubus CLI (ubus call, ubus listen, ubus wait_for), calling ubus from C (ubus_lookup_id, ubus_invoke, ubus_send_event), registering a new ubus object in a C daemon (ubus_add_object, ubus_method definitions), and the ACL permission file format for granting rpcd access to specific ubus paths.

- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-initscripts.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-initscripts.md) (2388 tokens) - Documents the OpenWrt /etc/init.d/ procd init script system, including the required START/STOP priority numbers, the USE_PROCD=1 flag, mandatory shell functions (start_service, stop_service, reload, status), and the boot sequence ordering enforced by procd. Covers how to enable/disable services via symlinks in /etc/rc.d/, reload semantics, and the difference between restart and reload.

- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-libnl.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-libnl.md) (545 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-libubox.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-libubox.md) (748 tokens) - Documents libubox, the OpenWrt utility library that underpins ubus, procd, and netifd. Covers the blob/blobmsg API for binary/JSON message encoding (blob_buf_init, blobmsg_add_*), the uloop event loop (uloop_run, uloop_fd_add, uloop_timeout_*), avl/list data structures, and the json_script policy-based configuration evaluator used by procd.
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-lldpd.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-lldpd.md) (335 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-luci.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-luci.md) (1499 tokens) - Provides a technical overview of the LuCI web interface framework for OpenWrt. Covers the three-tier architecture (controller/model/view), the CBI/form module system, Lua vs. JavaScript view types, the rpcd permission model, package Makefile conventions for registering menu entries and ACL files, and the workflow for developing and testing LuCI packages locally.

- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-netifd.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-netifd.md) (1929 tokens) - Documents netifd, the OpenWrt network interface daemon responsible for managing network interfaces based on UCI config. Explains the interface/device/proto handler model, the /etc/config/network schema (interface, device, bridge, route, rule sections), protocol handler shell scripts in /lib/netifd/proto/, ifup/ifdown/ifupdate hotplug event flow, and the ubus network API exposed by netifd.
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-odhcpd.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-odhcpd.md) (2900 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-preinit-mount.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-preinit-mount.md) (12192 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-procd.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-procd.md) (1963 tokens) - Describes procd, the OpenWrt process manager and init system that replaces busybox init. Covers the procd init script lifecycle (start_service, stop_service, reload), the procd_add_instance/procd_set_param API for declaring managed processes, service watchdog behavior, instance respawn limits, stdio/logging configuration, trigger-based reload via ubus events, and the /etc/init.d/ enable/disable mechanism.
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-process-boot.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-process-boot.md) (3243 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-requirements-boot-process.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-requirements-boot-process.md) (1562 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-rpcd.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-rpcd.md) (1043 tokens) - Documents rpcd, the OpenWrt RPC daemon that exposes ubus methods over HTTP for LuCI. Explains the plugin architecture (/usr/lib/rpcd/*.so), ACL JSON files that grant LuCI views permission to call specific ubus paths, the session management API (rpcd-mod-session), the file plugin for proxied filesystem reads/writes, and how LuCI RPC calls are authenticated via the uhttpd session cookie.
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-swconfig.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-swconfig.md) (3222 tokens) - No description
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-sysupgrade.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-sysupgrade.md) (2605 tokens) - No description

- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-ubus.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-ubus.md) (6656 tokens) - Explains the OpenWrt ubus inter-process communication bus, which provides a Unix-socket-based RPC mechanism for daemons to expose services and receive method calls. Covers ubus object and method registration, the ubusd broker, ubus_context lifecycle, blob_buf message encoding, ubus_lookup, ubus_invoke, ubus_register_event_handler, and the acl JSON permission system.
- [L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-uci.md](./L2-semantic/wiki/wiki_page-techref-uci.md) (3923 tokens) - Documents the OpenWrt Unified Configuration Interface (UCI) — the standard system for storing and modifying router configuration. Explains the /etc/config/ text file format, section and option syntax, the uci CLI (uci set/get/add/delete/commit/revert), the C library API (uci_load, uci_set, uci_commit), and batch-change semantics where changes stay staged in memory until commit.
